parameters.query:
INSERT INTO {{ $('Execute: adsets').item.json.db_name }}.`MC_ad_sets`(
  `adset_id`, `adset_name`, `act_account_id`, `account_id`, `campaign_id`, 
  `created_time`, `start_time`, `end_time`, `billing_event`, `budget_remaining`, 
  `daily_budget`, `destination_type`, `is_dynamic_creative`, `effective_status`, 
  `optimization_goal`, `learning_attribution_windows`, `learning_conversions`, 
  `learning_last_sig_edit_ts`, `learning_status`
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.id }},
  '{{ $json.name }}',
  'act_{{ $json.account_id }}',
  {{ $json.account_id }},
  {{ $json.campaign_id }},
  '{{ $json.created_time.replace("T"," ").substring(0,19) }}',
  '{{ $json.start_time.replace("T"," ").substring(0,19) }}',
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.end_time ? $json.end_time.replace("T"," ").substring(0,19) : '' }}', ''), NULL),
  '{{ $json.billing_event || '' }}',
  {{ ($json.budget_remaining || 0) / 100 }},
  COALESCE({{ ($json.daily_budget || 0) / 100 }}, NULL),
  '{{ $json.destination_type }}',
  '{{ $json.is_dynamic_creative }}',
  '{{ $json.effective_status }}',
  '{{ $json.optimization_goal }}',
  '{{ $json.learning_attribution_windows || '' }}',
  {{ $json.learning_conversions || 0 }},
  {{ $json.learning_last_sig_edit_ts || 0 }},
  '{{ $json.learning_status || '' }}'
) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  `adset_id` = {{ $json.id }},
  `adset_name` = '{{ $json.name }}',
  `act_account_id` = 'act_{{ $json.account_id }}',
  `account_id` = {{ $json.account_id }},
  `campaign_id` = {{ $json.campaign_id }},
  `created_time` = '{{ $json.created_time.replace("T"," ").substring(0,19) }}',
  `start_time` = '{{ $json.start_time.replace("T"," ").substring(0,19) }}',
  `end_time` = COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.end_time ? $json.end_time.replace("T"," ").substring(0,19) : '' }}', ''), NULL),
  `billing_event` = '{{ $json.billing_event || '' }}',
  `budget_remaining` = {{ ($json.budget_remaining || 0) / 100 }},
  `daily_budget` = COALESCE({{ ($json.daily_budget || 0) / 100 }}, NULL),
  `destination_type` = '{{ $json.destination_type }}',
  `is_dynamic_creative` = '{{ $json.is_dynamic_creative }}',
  `effective_status` = '{{ $json.effective_status }}',
  `optimization_goal` = '{{ $json.optimization_goal }}',
  `learning_attribution_windows` = '{{ $json.learning_attribution_windows || '' }}',
  `learning_conversions` = {{ $json.learning_conversions || 0 }},
  `learning_last_sig_edit_ts` = {{ $json.learning_last_sig_edit_ts || 0 }},
  `learning_status` = '{{ $json.learning_status || '' }}';
